description: GeraClone MCP — discover expert clones, check operator's clone status, start expert chats (consent).

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.geraservicesuk/mcp-gera-clone

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the GeraClone backend. Defaults to https://clone.gera.services/backend.
environmentVariables.name: GERACLONE_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: JWT for the operator on whose behalf the agent acts. Required for start_chat_with_expert, my_clone_status, and my_corpus_summary.
environmentVariables.name: GERA_USER_TOKEN
